title: Nursery Rhyme. DCLVII. Relics.
content:
To market, to market, to buy a plum-cake,
        Back again, back again, baby is late;
        To market, to market, to buy a plum-bun,
        Back again, back again, market is done.
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. DCLVII. Relics." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
